mechanism_narrative: Elevated federal funds rates increase the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, compressing valuation multiples and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC exceeds 0.05 over a 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are positive in >65% of high-rate observations.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in the unemployment rate above 4.0% signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending recession, triggering risk-off sentiment and negative equity returns over the following month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in >60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or trigger fails to predict direction with statistical significance (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate robust consumer spending and construction activity, driving corporate earnings growth and positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint signal yields negative 60-day forward returns in >55% of cases, or interaction term loses predictive power in out-of-sample walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp month-over-month acceleration in industrial production during the early stages of an economic expansion reflects improving capacity utilization and supply-side momentum, generating positive short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: Signal produces negative 5-day returns in >60% of early-cycle observations, or Rank IC remains below 0.02 over rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: The combination of persistently high consumer price inflation and elevated policy rates creates a stagflationary environment that compresses profit margins and discount rates simultaneously, leading to negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in >65% of triggered instances, or the interaction effect is statistically insignificant in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in total nonfarm payrolls supports household income and consumer demand, providing a fundamental floor for corporate earnings and generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns are negative in >60% of high-payroll-growth months.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth decelerating below 0.5% quarter-over-quarter signals a weakening economic expansion that reduces corporate revenue expectations, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX yields positive 60-day returns in >60% of triggered instances, or the threshold fails to separate bull and bear periods with p < 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between falling industrial production and rising unemployment indicates a synchronized contraction in output and labor demand, confirming recessionary pressures and driving negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint signal predicts positive 20-day returns in >55% of cases, or the interaction term shows no incremental predictive power over single-series baselines.
